column1: # WadsRadio station list: Singapore radio stations
# Columns: station name, stream URL, volume offset, stream type
# WadsRadio supports direct streams and HLS .m3u8 streams; the fourth column marks which source type is used.
# Checked but not included: Channel News Asia TV HLS because it is a TV/video feed, not a radio station.
# Checked but not included: StreamTheWorld .m3u8 variants for Mediacorp/SPH stations returned 403 during verification, so direct AAC/MP3 streams are used.
# Checked but not included: Radio Chutney's Radio.co embed exposed a station ID, but tested direct stream URLs returned 403/404.
# Checked but not included: guessed Power 98 and 88.3JIA side-channel stream IDs beyond the verified entries below returned 404.
